creator: dmitryluhtionov@gmail.com
text:
On RPI B2 I see many unused modules in /boot/kernel

Examlpe:

ls /boot/kernel/ata*
/boot/kernel/ata.ko		/boot/kernel/atajmicron.ko
/boot/kernel/ataacard.ko	/boot/kernel/atamarvell.ko
/boot/kernel/ataacerlabs.ko	/boot/kernel/atamicron.ko
/boot/kernel/ataamd.ko		/boot/kernel/atanational.ko
/boot/kernel/ataati.ko		/boot/kernel/atanetcell.ko
/boot/kernel/atacard.ko		/boot/kernel/atanvidia.ko
/boot/kernel/atacenatek.ko	/boot/kernel/atapci.ko
/boot/kernel/atacypress.ko	/boot/kernel/atapromise.ko
/boot/kernel/atacyrix.ko	/boot/kernel/ataserverworks.ko
/boot/kernel/atahighpoint.ko	/boot/kernel/atasiliconimage.ko
/boot/kernel/ataintel.ko	/boot/kernel/atasis.ko
/boot/kernel/ataisa.ko		/boot/kernel/atavia.ko
/boot/kernel/ataite.ko

mitya@rpi2:/boot/kernel# ls /boot/kernel/isp*
/boot/kernel/isp.ko		/boot/kernel/isp_2300.ko
/boot/kernel/isp_1040.ko	/boot/kernel/isp_2322.ko
/boot/kernel/isp_1080.ko	/boot/kernel/isp_2400.ko
/boot/kernel/isp_12160.ko	/boot/kernel/isp_2500.ko
/boot/kernel/isp_2100.ko	/boot/kernel/ispfw.ko
/boot/kernel/isp_2200.ko


mitya@rpi2:/boot/kernel# ls /boot/kernel/if_*
/boot/kernel/if_ae.ko		/boot/kernel/if_msk.ko
/boot/kernel/if_age.ko		/boot/kernel/if_mwl.ko
/boot/kernel/if_alc.ko		/boot/kernel/if_mxge.ko
/boot/kernel/if_ale.ko		/boot/kernel/if_my.ko
/boot/kernel/if_ath.ko		/boot/kernel/if_nge.ko
/boot/kernel/if_ath_pci.ko	/boot/kernel/if_oce.ko
/boot/kernel/if_aue.ko		/boot/kernel/if_otus.ko
/boot/kernel/if_axe.ko		/boot/kernel/if_patm.ko
/boot/kernel/if_axge.ko		/boot/kernel/if_pcn.ko
/boot/kernel/if_bce.ko		/boot/kernel/if_ral.ko
/boot/kernel/if_bfe.ko		/boot/kernel/if_re.ko
/boot/kernel/if_bge.ko		/boot/kernel/if_rl.ko
/boot/kernel/if_bnxt.ko		/boot/kernel/if_rsu.ko

/boot/kernel/if_bwn.ko		/boot/kernel/if_rum.ko
/boot/kernel/if_bwn_pci.ko	/boot/kernel/if_run.ko
/boot/kernel/if_cas.ko		/boot/kernel/if_sf.ko
/boot/kernel/if_cdce.ko		/boot/kernel/if_sge.ko
/boot/kernel/if_cpsw.ko		/boot/kernel/if_sis.ko

/boot/kernel/if_cxgb.ko		/boot/kernel/if_smsc.ko
/boot/kernel/if_dc.ko		/boot/kernel/if_sn.ko
/boot/kernel/if_de.ko		/boot/kernel/if_ste.ko
/boot/kernel/if_disc.ko		/boot/kernel/if_stf.ko
